title: Michael Saylor hints at fresh bitcoin buy with 'add more dots' post as MicroStrategy sits $11.7 billion underwater
message_html: Michael Saylor hints at fresh bitcoin buy with 'add more dots' post as MicroStrategy sits $11.7 billion underwater ...
snippet: The post lands a week after Strategy revealed its first bitcoin sale since 2022 and one day before voting closes on a STRC dividend amendment.
